content:
CrossFit W.O.D
Strength:
On a 15:00 Min Running Clock, Build Up to a 1RM Deadlift

Metcon:
3 R.F.T:
10 Hang Power Cleans #60/43kg
10 Front Squats
10 Pull Ups

CrossFit Endurance
4 Rounds For Time:
9 Toes To Bars
12 2KB STOH #2x16/12kg
24 Double Unders

02:00 Min Rest

4 Rounds For Time:
6 Burpee Pull Ups
12 2KB Front Rack Squats#2x16/12kg
60m 2KB Farmer's Carry

02:00 Min Rest

4 Rounds For Time:
3 WallWalks
12 Plate Overhead Sit-Ups #1x15/10kg
18 Alt. Plate BearHug Lunges
